title: avenula adsurgens subsp. ausserdorferi
intro: Avenula adsurgens subsp. ausserdorferi is a subspecies of the oat grass plant, native to the Alps region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Avenula adsurgens subsp. ausserdorferi include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, teas, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
